RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MACY'S LOGISTICS AND OPERATIONS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to cause of action 3 to plead facts beyond a long and distinguished career that would support an implied agreement to terminate only for cause.
